content: Better Auth: TypeScript-first library, users live in your own Postgres, organizations/RBAC as built-in plugins — best when multi-tenant from day one and you own the DB. Clerk: fastest DX, hosted user data, orgs paid, $0.02/MAU after 10K. Supabase Auth: cheapest ($0.00325/MAU after 50K free), deep RLS integration — auth.uid() enforced at DB level, best if building on Supabase. For a Supabase-based multi-tenant SaaS, Supabase Auth wins; otherwise Better Auth.
